title: Feyet Kiez

[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] '''Feyet Kiez''' served in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanded]] the [[Empire (Imperial II prototype)|''Empire'']], the first [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]], by [[5 BBY/Legends|5 BBY]]. Over a [[Standard decade/Legends|decade]] later he absconded from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Anaxes/Legends|Anaxes]] with the [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] ''[[Whelm]]'', which later resurfaced in the [[Pre–Shadow Hand campaign|early campaigns]] of the [[Dark Empire|reborn]] [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]].

==Biography==
Feyet Kiez held the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|navy]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="SotG">''[[Starships of the Galaxy]]''</ref> By [[5 BBY/Legends|5 BBY]],<ref name="Date">The [[Interrogator/Legends|''Interrogator'']], which {{JournalCite|11|The Longest Fall}} identifies as an [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]], was in operation by the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the events of {{JournalCite|4|The Final Exit}}, which ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates to [[5 BBY/Legends|5 BBY]]. Therefore, the [[Empire (Imperial II prototype)|''Empire'']], which ''[[Starships of the Galaxy]]'' identifies as the first of the ''Imperial II''-class, must have also been in operation by that [[Standard year/Legends|year]].</ref> he [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanded]] the [[Empire (Imperial II prototype)|''Empire'']], the first [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]]. The [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer's]] crew was handpicked to be among the finest in the Empire, and the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|vessel's]] duties were to capture [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] supply [[Convoy/Legends|convoys]] and [[Hospital ship/Legends|medical ships]].<ref name="SotG" />

[[File:Anaxes_TEA.jpg|thumb|225 px|Admiral Feyet Kiez fled Anaxes (pictured) with the Super Star Destroyer ''Whelm''.]]
Several [[Standard month/Legends|months]] prior to the [[Thrawn campaign]] of [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], Kiez and his command crew fled the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Anaxes/Legends|Anaxes]] with the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnaught]] ''[[Whelm]]'',<ref name="TEGTW" /> a [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] of the Anaxes-based [[First Army|Azure Hammer Command]].<ref name="CCW">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref> When [[Osted Wermis]],<ref name="TEGTW" /> Anaxes's Imperial [[Commandant/Legends|commandant]],<ref name="CCW" /> surrendered the planet to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], he expressed confusion as to Kiez's intentions. [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] considered Kiez's disappearance with the ''Whelm'' to be the most concerning report out of several similar stories of high-ranking Imperials disappearing along with [[Warship/Legends|warships]].<ref name="TEGTW" />

In fact, Kiez had taken the ''Whelm'' to the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]], where the [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], who had been [[Transfer essence|resurrected]] on the Deep Core world [[Byss/Legends|Byss]] following his [[Death/Legends|death]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], had summoned Imperial forces [[Dark Empire|loyal to him]]. The ''Whelm'' later participated in the reborn [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor's]] [[Pre–Shadow Hand campaign|early campaigns]].<ref name="TEGTW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Feyet Kiez was first mentioned in the [[2001]] sourcebook ''[[Starships of the Galaxy]]'', written by [[Owen K.C. Stephens]] and published by [[Wizards of the Coast]] for use with the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="SotG" />
